privileged_info_summary: The add_room_database task requires implementing Android Room database persistence in a synthetic TaskTracker project at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/TaskTracker. The project structure and all source files are generated during task setup. Room 2.6.1 is a legitimate Android Jetpack release from November 29, 2023. KSP version 1.9.22-1.0.17 is a valid Kotlin Symbol Processing release from January 18, 2024, compatible with Kotlin 1.9.22. The data package directory is app/src/main/java/com/example/tasktracker/data. Required source files are Task.kt (entity), TaskDao.kt (data access object), and AppDatabase.kt (Room database class).
